senses.gloss: jüdisches Neujahrsfest, das am Abend nach Sonnenuntergang des 29. Elul beginnt und, ursprünglich, am 1. Tischri, traditionell, am 2. Tischri endet
senses.gloss_en_full: Jewish New Year festival that begins on the evening after sunset on the 29th of Elul and ends on the 1st of Tishrei (originally) or the 2nd of Tishrei (traditionally)
